//: Curated mapping from docs/ source files to wiki pages. Hand-maintained — the publish workflow (.github/workflows/docs-wiki-publish.yml) does NOT parse docs/README.md's prose; update this file whenever docs/README.md's own audience groups change. Groups mirror docs/README.md exactly. docs/proposals/ (drafts/HOLD specs), docs/reports/, and docs/audits/ are deliberately excluded from wiki publication.
